name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to work with numerical data, interpret statistics, and make data-based decisions. Suitable for roles requiring quantitative analysis.

name: Verify Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to understand and evaluate written information, draw conclusions from text, and communicate effectively.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns, think conceptually, and solve novel problems — key for analytical and managerial roles.

name: Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Evaluates logical reasoning ability — drawing conclusions from given information. Used for roles requiring structured thinking.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability
description: Basic numerical operations and working with numbers. Suitable for roles requiring everyday numerical competence.

name: Verify - Verbal Ability
description: Measures verbal comprehension and reasoning at a basic level. Ideal for clerical and administrative roles.

name: Verify - Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy of checking information — essential for data entry, administrative and compliance roles.

name: Verify - Calculation
description: Tests basic arithmetic calculation speed and accuracy. Appropriate for clerical, financial, and operational roles.

name: Verify G+ - Cognitive Ability
description: Comprehensive general cognitive ability assessment combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. Predictive of performance across all roles.

name: Numerical Reasoning
description: Classic numerical reasoning test for evaluating analytical thinking with numbers and statistics.

name: Verbal Reasoning
description: Classic verbal reasoning assessment measuring comprehension and critical evaluation of written information.

name: Inductive Reasoning
description: Pattern recognition and abstract reasoning test used for managerial and graduate-level hiring.

name: Mechanical Comprehension
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical and physical principles. Essential for engineering and technical roles.

name: Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures ability to visualise and mentally rotate shapes in 2D and 3D — relevant for design, engineering, and technical roles.

name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r) measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to occupational performance. Industry-leading personality assessment for selection and development at all levels.

name: OPQ32n
description: Normative version of the OPQ32, measuring personality across 32 dimensions. Used for leadership and senior-level selection.

name: Motives, Values, Preferences Inventory (MVPI)
description: Measures core values, goals, and interests that drive behaviour. Predicts job satisfaction and culture fit.

name: Work Strengths
description: Assesses an individual's key behavioural strengths relevant to workplace performance. Suitable for volume hiring.

name: General Personality Assessment (GPA)
description: Broad personality questionnaire measuring traits relevant to work performance across industries.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Measures a range of workplace skills including communication, problem solving and decision making, relevant across global contexts.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses Java 8 programming knowledge including OOP, streams, lambda expressions, collections, and concurrency. For mid to senior developers.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Advanced Core Java assessment covering JVM internals, concurrency, design patterns, and enterprise Java concepts.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming knowledge including syntax, data structures, OOP, libraries, and scripting. Suitable for software developers and data roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript programming knowledge including ES6+, async programming, DOM manipulation, and common patterns.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests knowledge of SQL including queries, joins, aggregations, stored procedures, and database design. For data and backend roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Assesses C++ programming skills including STL, memory management, OOP, and modern C++ features.

name: C# (New)
description: Tests C# programming knowledge including .NET framework, LINQ, async/await, and object-oriented design.

name: Automata - Fix (Coding Simulation)
description: Coding simulation where candidates fix bugs in provided code. Assesses real-world programming ability in multiple languages including Java, Python, C++.

name: Entry Level Software Engineer (Coding)
description: Practical coding assessment for entry-level software engineers. Covers data structures, algorithms, and basic programming concepts.

name: Technology Professional (Coding)
description: Coding assessment for experienced technology professionals, testing problem-solving, algorithms, and software design.

name: Microsoft Excel (New)
description: Tests proficiency with Microsoft Excel including formulas, pivot tables, data analysis, and macros.

name: Microsoft Word (New)
description: Assesses Microsoft Word skills including document formatting, tables, styles, mail merge, and collaboration features.

name: Accounting/Finance (Short)
description: Tests foundational accounting and financial concepts for roles in finance, banking, and accounting functions.

name: Financial Analysis Skills Test
description: Comprehensive financial analysis assessment covering financial modeling, valuation, and analytical skills for finance roles.

name: Administrative Professional - Short Form
description: Assesses skills critical for administrative and clerical roles including data management, communication, and organization.

name: Customer Service Aptitude Assessment
description: Situational judgement test for customer-facing roles measuring service orientation, communication, and problem-solving.

name: Situational Judgement Test
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios and asks candidates to choose the most effective response. Predicts on-the-job behaviour.

name: Graduate 8 (G8) - Situational Judgement
description: SJT designed for graduate-level candidates assessing judgment across 8 competencies critical for early career success.

name: Sales Aptitude Assessment
description: Measures aptitude for sales roles by assessing influence, resilience, customer focus, and achievement motivation.

name: Contact Center Aptitude Assessment
description: Targeted for contact center and BPO roles measuring customer handling, multitasking, and communication skills.

name: Retail Aptitude Assessment
description: Assesses aptitude for retail roles including customer service orientation, teamwork, reliability, and sales focus.

name: Leadership Report (OPQ)
description: Generates a leadership-focused report from OPQ32 data, mapping personality to leadership competencies and potential.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF)
description: Comprehensive competency framework covering 8 factors and 20 competencies. Used for talent assessment, development, and succession planning.

name: Hogan Personality Inventory (HPI)
description: Measures normal personality characteristics that predict job performance, leadership, and career success.

name: Hogan Development Survey (HDS)
description: Identifies personality-based performance risks and derailers — critical for leadership selection and development.

name: In-Basket Exercise
description: Simulates a manager's email inbox requiring candidates to prioritize, delegate, and respond to realistic work scenarios.

name: MQ: Motivation Questionnaire
description: Assesses motivational factors that drive an individual's engagement and performance at work. Used for selection and development.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire (CCSQ)
description: Personality questionnaire designed for customer-facing and sales roles. Measures interpersonal and service-oriented traits.

name: Work Style Questionnaire (WSQ)
description: Shorter personality questionnaire capturing core work-related behavioural tendencies. Used for high-volume hiring.

name: Graduate and Managerial Assessment (GMA - Numerical)
description: Graduate and managerial-level numerical reasoning test measuring the ability to interpret and draw conclusions from numerical data.

name: Graduate and Managerial Assessment (GMA - Verbal)
description: Graduate and managerial-level verbal reasoning assessment measuring comprehension and evaluation of written information.

name: Graduate and Managerial Assessment (GMA - Abstract)
description: Abstract reasoning test for graduate and managerial assessment measuring pattern recognition and conceptual thinking.

name: Scenarios: Sales
description: Simulation-based assessment for sales roles presenting realistic customer scenarios and evaluating sales effectiveness.

name: Scenarios: Service
description: Service-focused simulation assessing how candidates handle difficult customers, service failures, and teamwork situations.

name: Data Entry Speed and Accuracy Assessment
description: Measures speed and accuracy in data entry tasks. Critical for administrative, clerical, and data management roles.

name: Occupational Stress Indicator
description: Assesses stress levels and coping strategies in the workplace. Used for development and wellbeing programmes.

name: Agile Software Developer
description: Tests knowledge of Agile methodologies, Scrum, Kanban, and DevOps practices for software development roles.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Assesses DevOps knowledge including CI/CD, containerization, cloud infrastructure, monitoring, and automation.

name: AWS (New)
description: Tests AWS cloud knowledge including core services, architecture, security, and deployment for cloud engineering roles.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Assesses machine learning knowledge including algorithms, model evaluation, feature engineering, and practical ML concepts.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Tests data science concepts including statistics, data manipulation, visualization, and applied analytics for data scientist roles.

name: General Sales Aptitude (GSA)
description: Broad sales aptitude assessment covering drive, resilience, relationship-building, and customer focus for all sales roles.

name: Management and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB) - Verbal
description: High-level verbal reasoning assessment from the MGIB series for management and graduate-level selection.

name: Management and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB) - Numerical
description: High-level numerical reasoning assessment from the MGIB series for management and graduate selection.

name: Workplace English Test
description: Assesses English language proficiency in a workplace context including reading, comprehension, and writing for non-native speakers.

name: Bank Administrative Assistant - Short Form
description: Designed for administrative roles in banking and financial services, covering relevant numerical and clerical skills.
